task_completion.description: Open the T8_housing_bracket.FCStd model in FreeCAD
task_completion.visual_evidence: FreeCAD application is open and displaying the 3D model of the T8 housing bracket in the workspace.

task_completion.description: Create a new drawing page using the TechDraw workbench
task_completion.visual_evidence: The TechDraw workbench is active, and a 2D drawing page (typically with a title block template) is visible in the main view area.

task_completion.description: Insert front, right-side, and top orthographic views
task_completion.visual_evidence: The drawing page contains at least three distinct 2D orthographic projections (front, top, and right side) of the bracket.

task_completion.description: Insert an isometric or auxiliary view
task_completion.visual_evidence: The drawing page contains an angled, 3D-style isometric or auxiliary projection of the bracket alongside the orthographic views.

task_completion.description: Add at least 6 critical dimension annotations
task_completion.visual_evidence: There are at least 6 visible dimension lines with measurements (e.g., lengths, radii, hole diameters, or distances) attached to the drawing views.

task_completion.description: Save the FreeCAD document and export the drawing as a PDF
task_completion.visual_evidence: FreeCAD save/export dialogs are visible with the filenames 'bracket_drawing.FCStd' and 'bracket_drawing.pdf', or a file manager shows these files successfully created in /home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/.

integrity.description: Agent used the FreeCAD GUI to create the drawing
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent actively clicking through FreeCAD menus, switching to the TechDraw workbench, and manually placing views/dimensions, rather than running a background script.

integrity.description: Dimensions were generated by FreeCAD's TechDraw tools
integrity.visual_evidence: Dimension annotations match FreeCAD's standard TechDraw styling (standard arrows, extension lines, and text) and are not drawn manually using an external image editor or generic text boxes.

integrity.description: Files were genuinely exported from the active FreeCAD session
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent interacts with the 'Export PDF' and 'Save As' functions within FreeCAD, rather than just renaming existing files in the terminal.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires using FreeCAD's TechDraw workbench to create a 2D engineering drawing. The final drawing must contain at least 4 views (front, right-side, top, and isometric/auxiliary) and exactly or at least 6 dimension annotations. The outputs must be saved as 'bracket_drawing.pdf' and 'bracket_drawing.FCStd' in the /home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/ directory.
